offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, compliance oversight causes legal penalties. We automate compliance checklist creation instead of manual checklist creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in maintaining up-to-date compliance checklists and reports.

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
